/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/DIT-Transfer-Tools.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/DIT-Transfer-Tools.dir/DIT-Transfer-Tools_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/DIT-Transfer-Tools.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/DIT-Transfer-Tools.dir/src/MainWindow.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/DIT-Transfer-Tools.dir/src/TransferTask.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/DIT-Transfer-Tools.dir/src/QueueManager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/DIT-Transfer-Tools.dir/src/AddTaskDialog.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/DIT-Transfer-Tools.dir/src/ParallelManager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/DIT-Transfer-Tools.dir/src/HashManager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/DIT-Transfer-Tools.dir/src/DriveMonitor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/DIT-Transfer-Tools.dir/src/SettingsManager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/DIT-Transfer-Tools.dir/src/ProgressMonitor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/DIT-Transfer-Tools.dir/src/ErrorManager.cpp.o" -o DIT-Transfer-Tools  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.8.2
